basics.name: Rostyslav Bondarchuk
basics.label: Senior QA Engineer
summary: Senior QA Engineer with 20+ years of experience delivering high-quality software in complex, distributed systems. Specialized in test automation, CI/CD integration, and quality strategy across microservices architectures.
Transformed QA processes by reducing regression time from 3 days to 30 minutes using scalable Playwright automation.
Strong expertise in API testing, Python-based tooling, and Salesforce ecosystems. Experienced in leading QA initiatives, improving test coverage, and enabling faster, more reliable releases.
Experienced in end-to-end testing, API validation, and quality ownership across the full software delivery lifecycle.
Passionate about DevOps practices, infrastructure as code (Ansible), and building production-like environments using containerization and homelabs.
Core skills: Test Automation, CI/CD, API Testing, Microservices Testing, SDET, Integration Testing.

work.name: Intellias
highlights: Reduced regression testing time from 3 days of manual testing to 30 minutes using a scalable Playwright-based E2E automation framework.
Improved deployment reliability by introducing static validation of SOQL queries, preventing production defects and data inconsistencies.
Identified and automated high-risk approval rule scenarios, significantly increasing test coverage and team velocity.
Contributed to QA strategy and automation roadmap, aligning testing efforts with CI/CD pipelines and release goals.
Assisted development teams in reproducing environment-specific bugs within the staging pipeline.

work.name: SOC Prime
highlights: Validated functionality and integration of a microservices-based system, ensuring stability across distributed components.
Automated routine QA workflows using a Python-based CLI tool integrating with REST APIs, reducing manual effort by 80% and improving consistency.
Implemented continuous health monitoring using Python and GitLab CI, reducing incident detection time and improving system reliability.

work.name: Avenga
highlights: Led QA efforts across multiple teams in a large-scale project, contributing to 33% of total test execution with a lean team of 2 engineers.
Mentored QA engineers and improved testing processes, introducing better test design practices and increasing overall team efficiency.
Developed comprehensive Salesforce administration courses tailored for  QA professionals.

work.name: Interlink
highlights: Analyzed business requirements and wrote test cases, test conditions, test plans, and test reports.
Estimated, planned, and coordinated testing activities, ensuring that quality issues and defects are correctly identified, documented, tracked, and resolved.
Conducted technical interviews, contributing to team growth and talent acquisition.

projects.name: HomeLab Automation
projects.description: Full Proxmox homelab automation using Ansible and Podman Quadlets.
highlights: Automated deploy of 10+ services (Immich, AdGuard, Paperless-NGX, FreshRSS, etc.).
Implemented reverse proxy using Caddy with automated SSL.
